snippet.title: Chris Murray
snippet.description:
Housekeeping supervisor by day, event planner on weekends. Videos about woodworking projects, quinceañera planning, home cooking, and whatever I find interesting. Las Vegas, NV.

Business inquiries: chris.murray@Finthesiss.ai
